speaker: seller

args.message: Legendary 5.0L Coyote V8 power in a head-turning package! This well-maintained GT features the premium audio system, leather-trimmed seats, and that unmistakable exhaust note. Perfect for the enthusiast looking for classic American muscle at an affordable price.

speaker: seller

args.message: This Mustang GT has a clean history, my friend! No rental car here, this was a personal vehicle for a previous owner who clearly cherished it. We get a lot of cars through here, and this one's a gem. It's been well looked after, no major issues to speak of. You're looking at a solid piece of American muscle.

You won't find a better deal on a V8 powerhouse like this anywhere. Ready to talk numbers? I assume? I saw one just like this go for $21,000 last week at auction. Butner Brothers Auction!
